name: Rubicon Project
description: Rubicon Project, now part of Magnite, is one of the largest independent sell-side advertising platforms. It provides programmatic advertising technology for publishers to manage and monetize their ad inventory across display, video, and mobile formats through real-time bidding.
advantages: Access to major advertising demand sources
disadvantages: Consolidated market with few major competitors
Complex setup for header bidding integrations
Revenue share model reduces publisher earnings
Ad quality and brand safety concerns
